---
title: "variables_t_check"
author: "Alexander Porshnev"
date: "2023-09-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, results = 'asis')

library(data.table)
library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
```



```{r }
years_to_load<-c(2005:2021)

init_dir <- "C:/Alex/Maynooth/IAT/Gender-Career/Datasets/RAW_Preprocessed"

raw_data_dir<-paste0(init_dir, "/GenderCareer_iat_", years_to_load)
i=1
for (i in c(1:length(years_to_load))){
  data_files<-list.files(raw_data_dir[i])
  data_files<-data_files[grep("*.txt$",data_files)]
  data_files<-paste0(raw_data_dir[i],"/", data_files)
  data_from_year<-NULL
  for (j in data_files[1]){
    d<-fread(j, header = TRUE, sep = "\t")
    data_from_year<-rbind(data_from_year, d)    
  }
  t_data<-data_from_year
t_data$
  print(kable(table(t_data$block_name, t_data$block_number),  caption = paste0(years_to_load[i],": Description cross-table block_name-block_number")))
}

```
